artifact.source:
ERROR rate over time — app.log

22 ERROR lines out of 100 total log lines across the 09:00–10:00 window, bucketed into ten-minute intervals. Errors cluster sharply between 09:20 and 09:40, driven by a pricing upstream outage that trips the circuit breaker (see line 57, `circuit_opened`) before recovering by 09:40 (`circuit_closed`).

Repeated `econnrefused` failures against the pricing upstream exhaust retries (line 53), trip the circuit breaker open (line 57), and the app serves 503s until a half-open probe succeeds at 09:39:58 and the breaker closes at 09:40:22.

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
